title: Surface → atmosphere ramp (logical IDs; wire in apps by route)
description: surfaceId is a stable string consumed by hub, bonding, static demos, and docs. starfieldAOD: on = use ramp.starfieldPreset; off = never mount animated starfield; degraded = static plate / CSS fallback only (implement per surface).

routes.notes: Phos / Garden — child posture; pair with RouteGuard in apps.
Three.js dome / mesh observatory class surfaces.
Local :3131 — prefer static plate where WebGL competes with panels.
Sovereign lab dashboards (when shipped as hub or app route).
Filings, privacy print, any court-facing static.
Geodesic client shell — instrument plane; no shapes in-room is product rule, not ramp.
soup.html — C.A.R.S. entry; emotional bandwidth closer to play plane.
poets-room.html — calmer lobby caps than soup; still animated.
Alias for mesh-touches surface passport → same ramp as cognitive-passport.
mesh-start.html — EDE welcome / mesh bind posture.
connect.html — K₄ navigator (Three.js foreground; hints + optional future layer).
observatory.html — static Three dome shell; same ramp family as dome.
